'''Jennie Lee Taggar''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. She flew a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. She died while attacking a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]].

She had a son named [[Rone Taggar]], who became a pilot with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], and would later name his [[T-65BR X-wing reconnaissance starfighter|Recon-X]] starfighter after her, the ''[[Jennie Lee]]''.

==Behind the scenes==
Jennie Lee Taggar's name is inferred from the name of the ''[[Jennie Lee]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}}
